quick_skim.title: Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flows for Bayesian Inference of Diffusions with Inaccessible Boundaries
quick_skim.abstract: One of the primary challenges in Bayesian inference on the parameters of a diffusion model from discrete observations is the unavailability of an analytical expression for the transition density function between consecutive observation times, which is needed to derive the likelihood function.   Extending previous studies that solve Fokker-Planck (FP) type partial differential equations with Normalizing Flows, we propose a new Normalizing Flow architecture to learn the transition density function of the diffusion process between two observation times. We do so by solving in a Neural Galerkin framework the associated FP equation with a Dirac mass as initial condition, over a specified training distribution of the initial datum and the coefficients of the diffusion. We specifically focus on processes whose diffusion matrix vanishes in certain inaccessible boundary regions, such as Stochastic Volatility models that satisfy a Feller condition.   The product of the obtained transition densities evaluated along the observed trajectory approximates the likelihood function, thereby enabling cheap posterior sampling via Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC). After the offline training phase, inference becomes significantly more efficient, as it avoids the need to solve the FP equation in real time for each parameter proposed by the MCMC sampler or to rely on other likelihood-free methods for Bayesian inference that involve repeated simulation of diffusion bridges.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: learns transition density of diffusion process, connects two distributions via Fokker-Planck
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 学习扩散过程的转移密度，通过Fokker-Planck方程连接两个分布
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 学习扩散过程的转移密度，通过Fokker-Planck方程连接两个分布
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 学习扩散过程的转移密度，通过Fokker-Planck方程连接两个分布
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes neural Galerkin normalizing flow to learn transition density of diffusions, enabling Bayesian inference with inaccessible boundaries; directly models probability flow between two time points.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对扩散模型贝叶斯推断中转移密度无法解析计算的问题，提出神经Galerkin归一化流架构，通过求解Fokker-Planck方程学习扩散过程在两个观测时刻之间的转移密度。该方法将Dirac初始条件作为输入，训练网络近似解。这本质上是学习一个扩散桥（从初始点分布到终点分布）的转移密度，为扩散桥的构造提供了新工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对扩散模型贝叶斯推断中转移密度无法解析计算的问题，提出神经Galerkin归一化流架构，通过求解Fokker-Planck方程学习扩散过程在两个观测时刻之间的转移密度。该方法将Dirac初始条件作为输入，训练网络近似解。这本质上是学习一个扩散桥（从初始点分布到终点分布）的转移密度，为扩散桥的构造提供了新工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: diffusion bridge connecting two probability distributions
